title: Mazite
body:
A client based collection of mods and resoucre packs for players that want to actually play the game on vanilla servers - boosts your fps and enjoyment!
Includes 200+ optimization, vanilla styled mods and Qol mods aiming to improve gameplay quality.

This modpack focuses on improving the vanilla game's visuals throuh mods like voxy, better clouds, particle rain, fresh animations and the lightweight shader mellow while including the vanilla feel and even better fps than in vanilla with mods like sodium, lithium, entity culling and c²me. It also includes some mods exeptionally good at enhancing quality of life while exploring such as xaeros minimap, xaeros worldmap and projectile preview to see if your pearls will land on that one end island in the distance. You might already have seen the combat tag that is listed and this is because of the overly wide variety of pvp mods such as ukus armor hud, marlowwws chrystal optimizer, shulker box tooltip, crosshair indicator, totem tweaks and status effect timer so if you just want a semi-decent pvp modpack you could also use mazite. For the more creatively tallented ones of us who want to build their megabases in a creative world and then build it in survival i have added litematica and litematica preview and for the youtuber or just casual builder i have added freecam to create thumbnails and view structures from above as also flashback to record your best moments in your world. Additionally i also have the best selected 3d resource packs and mods because you cant deny that they look wonderfull. As expected by any modpack dev i have added absolutely all the mods that are just essentials like simple voice chat, appleskin, continuity, jei and others that you will most likely recognize as they should already be in the game. concludong the introduction i just want to mention that this is just a fraction of the mods in the modpack and there are new surprizes around every corner, so do you dare see them yourself?

**Poll about update frequency on the discord**

**Thaks yall for your incredible support thanks for 100 downloads**

Also note that this is a **very Alpha**, untested and WIP modpack so if you have any issues or encounter bugs or incompatibilities please report it on the discord.

**DISCLAIMER** you might get punished for using this pack on major servers due to some mods that give a minor competitive advantadge and could be seen as cheats. limited use reccomended, this pack is ideal for your friend group's server so keep in mind if you play on major multiplayer servers for example hypixel or donutSMP this modpack is **NOT** ideal to use.

**WARNING** In verson 0.2.0 i added a few experimental, heavy, ray-traced and (for older hardware)performance neutralizing shaders so understandably using any othes shader than [Miniature](https://modrinth.com/shader/miniature-shader), [Mellow](https://modrinth.com/shader/mellow), [Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader), IterationT or [Simple Shadows](https://modrinth.com/shader/simple-shadows) may cause significant performance loss and/or cause bugs, glitches and incompatability for texture packs and mods, as the new experimental  shaders are just intended for screenshots and/or cinematics.
